name: Mako Shark Steak Au Poivre
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Cognac, plus more as needed
recipeInstructions:
Heat clarified butter in a heavy, large skillet until hot. Working in batches if necessary, sauté fish slices until crusty and lightly golden, about 2 to 3 minutes per side. Transfer to warm serving plates and keep warm.
Pour off all but about 1 tablespoon of butter from the skillet. Add shallots and toss briefly. Carefully add Cognac. Add cream and veal glaze or veal stock and any juices from the fish. Reduce until the mixture lightly coats the back of a spoon. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper and a few drops of Cognac. Strain over the fish and serve.
